steps.title: Calculate the cost of confetti
steps.content:
Sophia bought 10 packages of confetti at $3 per package. Multiply to find the total cost:
$$10 \times 3 = 30$$
She spent \$30 on confetti.

steps.title: Find the number of balloons
steps.content:
She spent $56 total and $30 on confetti, so:
$$56 - 30 = 26$$
This is the amount left for balloons. Since each balloon costs \$1, Sophia bought 26 balloons.
